outcome_summary: Seventh routine fire of the T-SEED-QA seed-graph QA census. Scored shard 07 — 27 pedagogical_prerequisite edges (C1) + 20 nodes (C2/C3) per the pinned seed_qa_audit.md rubric — and wrote seed_qa_evidence/shard_07.md. Findings: C1 0/27 defective = 0.0% (the census's third 0-defect shard after 04 and 06; 24 Sound, 3 Defensible, 0 Reversed, 0 Weak-redundant); C2 0/20 fail; C3 1/20 fail = 5.0% (N-18 free_play_imagination_understanding, a summary gated on a whole Kantian framework — 'the judgment of taste', technical 'determinate concept', 'universal communicability'). One audit-touched edge: E-13 physicalism->reductionism_in_science, examined as a prune candidate by migration 0063's weak-edge cleanup pass and deliberately KEPT with the evidence annotation it now carries verbatim; the other 26 edges are not audit-touched. Running C1 across shards 01-07: 10.7% / 3.6% / 3.6% / 0.0% / 3.7% / 0.0% / 0.0%, firmly under the production audit's 13% baseline. Two of the 3 Defensibles (E-9 climate_ethics->future_generations, E-26 scientific_theory->law_of_nature) share the recurring could-be-reversed 'target is the more general/co-equal concept' shape that shards 05-06 also flagged; each was held at Defensible on its merits (E-9 has a real concrete-entry-point reading and a 0.9 weight signalling authoring hesitation; E-26 is genuinely near-co-equal) and the recurring shape is flagged for the SQA-20 closeout as a cross-shard rubric-calibration question, which is above an evidence session's remit. The Defensible count (3) is down from shard 06's 6 and within the recent range — the over-Defensible-drift watch item is not worsening, but the shape persists. The C3 fail is the third consecutive shard with a jargon-gated summary (shard 05 N-8, shard 06 N-16, shard 07 N-18) — a real non-noise C3 failure mode, flagged for a closeout pattern entry; N-18 is the clearest of the three (framework-gated, not single-term-gated). Candidate findings only; disposition is the SQA-20 closeout. SQA-07 marked complete; SQA-08 next. No in-band Issues. mempalace_zero_citations_after_search fires because the boot search surfaced only diary/planning drawers (0 substantive decision/pushback drawers above the 0.60 threshold) — the same benign shape every prior census shard saw; the evidence file and diary reference S-0122 and S-0165 prior context as named-session references rather than drawer-ID citations. 0 validator hard-fails (50 checks on --final-check).
